final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Douyin (TikTok CN) live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial beauty idol, holding a handwritten sign during a live broadcast.

Style/medium: realistic Douyin live-stream UI screenshot, mobile vertical format
Composition: front-facing medium shot of the host centered in frame, Douyin live-stream UI overlay visible (viewer count, comment scroll, like animations, red gift icons along edges)
Subject: a beautiful young Chinese woman (神仙姐姐 style — ethereal, fair-skinned, elegant) holding a rectangular sign with both hands, facing the camera with a warm welcoming smile
Scene/backdrop: indoor live-stream setup, soft studio or bedroom background with ring-light glow
Lighting/mood: warm, flattering ring-light frontal lighting, bright and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, Douyin dark UI chrome (black top/bottom bars), colorful comment bubbles and gift animations
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): sign text reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" printed or handwritten clearly on the held sign; Douyin live UI elements showing viewer count and scrolling comments
Constraints: 9:16 vertical ratio, Douyin live-stream interface must be visible as overlay, sign text must be legible
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, Western streaming UI (Twitch/YouTube), overly dark or moody lighting
